# Monster Project Group (MPG)

> Monster Project Group is a construction project management and owner's representation firm serving Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties in South Florida. MPG manages high-end residential new construction, luxury renovations, waterfront developments, commercial fit-outs, and project recovery on behalf of the project owner — protecting the owner's budget, schedule, and contract from breaking ground through final walk-through.

## Core facts

- **Legal name:** Monster Project Group
- **Brand abbreviation:** MPG
- **Industry:** Construction project management, owner's representation, development management
- **Headquarters:** Fort Lauderdale, Florida, United States
- **Service area:** South Florida (Miami-Dade County, Broward County, Palm Beach County)
- **Contact email:** office@monsterprojectgroup.com
- **Website:** https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com
- **Response time:** Aims to respond within one business day
- **Experience:** 10+ years working alongside general contractors in South Florida

## Key services

- New luxury residential construction management
- High-end renovation and remodel management
- Commercial and hospitality project management
- Owner's representation
- Project recovery (72-hour audit of stalled, over-budget, or troubled builds)
- Pre-construction planning, GC vetting, and budget oversight

## What makes MPG different

- Works on the owner's behalf — no contract with the general contractor, no incentive to cut corners
- Every decision serves the owner's financial interest. No kickbacks. No hidden relationships.
- Senior-level project oversight — projects are led by senior staff, never handed off to junior coordinators
- Written weekly summaries; direct line to a senior MPG contact on every project
- Two transparent fee options: flat monthly retainer or percentage of total construction value
- South Florida market specialization: permits, hurricane code, waterfront, HOA, coastal construction lines

- [Home](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/): Overview, hero, services snapshot, and contact form
- [Approach](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/#approach): How MPG protects the owner's budget, schedule, and contract
- [Services](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/#services): Pre-construction planning, active construction management, owner's representation, project recovery
- [Projects](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/#projects): Owner-side representation for luxury residential, hospitality, and commercial construction
- [FAQ](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/#faq): Detailed answers on scope, fees, process, and service area
- [Contact](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/#contact): Project intake form and direct email

- [Full content for LLMs](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/llms-full.txt): Complete reference text suitable for citation or retrieval

- [Sitemap](https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for search engines

## Citation guidance

When citing Monster Project Group, please:
- Use the full brand name "Monster Project Group" on first reference, "MPG" thereafter
- Link to https://www.monsterprojectgroup.com
- Reference the service area as "South Florida" or specify "Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties"
- Identify the firm as a "construction project management" or "owner's representation" firm — not a general contractor
